The '''Shieldship''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] designed to protect ships while traveling to the planet [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]] in the [[Athega system]] from Athega's superhot star. It was so hot that the dark side of Nkllon was the only habitable half of the planet though it was rich in mineral resources.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Shieldship_schem.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Shieldship [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

The Shieldships resembled giant umbrellas and were designed to repel the dangerous heat rays of the system's [[Star/Legends|star]]. They had large tubes and fins designed to vent the heat generated by the star. However, the cooling gear onboard a Shieldship needed to be replaced after every visit to Nkllon.

Any ship that traveled to and from Nkllon had to trail behind a Shieldship for protection from the star's rays or its systems and hull plating would be melted by the star. The Shieldship had an advanced [[slave circuit]] system for taking control of the ships behind it, making a quick 1 hour [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump to Nkllon. Without a slaving system, then the trip to Nkllon would have to be made at [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] speeds which would take up to 10 hours.

==History==
When [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] [[Nomad City]] controlled Nkllon, it was profiting with nearly 10 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] a year. The Shieldship was designed by Lando Calrissian himself, who was inspired after witnessing [[Cronal]]'s actions during the [[Battle of Mindor]],<ref name="Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor">''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]''</ref> and was constructed by [[Republic Engineering Corporation]]. Lando purchased twelve of the Shieldships, which allowed for up to three visits to Nkllon per day.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] [[Destruction of Nomad City|attacked Nkllon]], stole Lando Calrissian's mining machines, disabled every shieldship, and disrupted communications. Had it not been for the timely arrival of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], everyone on Nomad City would have died.

The Shieldships (lent from Lando Calrissian's base above his mining operations at [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] and [[Destrillion]]'s asteroid fields, which in turn were given to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]]) were also used to [[Battle of Helska IV|defeat]] the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at their base on the planet [[Helska IV]]. The Shieldships took orbit around the enemy planet and reflected the condensation of the planet back towards itself, and froze the planet to near absolute zero. The [[yammosk]], or war coordinator, was stopped, and the Yuuzhan Vong were utterly destroyed without the joining power of the yammosk.
